series_metadata.series_description: Requests and approval workflows for all draw game promotions; Includes retailer, chain, district, regional and statewide promotions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: all statewide promotions three (3) years in system; move cold storage three (3) years ; Electronic: all individual retailer, chain, region, district promotions one (1) year in system; move cold storage three (3) years
